content: VideoSkillOpt rollout run with web-video-presentation methodology.
Process topic8 via local saved WeChat HTML source, auto-select first/default checkpoint options, and complete full presentation rollout.

cmd: materialize source to article.md from local HTML
obs: success; extracted readable Chinese article from #js_content and removed JS/CSS noise

cmd: generate script.md + outline.md with default checkpoint choices
obs: success; script + outline generated; theme auto-selected to first suitable recommendation: indigo-porcelain; mode default A
success; Vite React TS project generated with 5 chapters / 20 steps; chapter visuals are click-driven and non-PPT

cmd: run npm run extract-narrations, npx tsc --noEmit, npm run build
obs: all passed; extracted 20 narration segments; build output in presentation/dist
blocked; bash shell compatibility error on pipefail option in synthesize-audio.sh, recorded in audio-log.txt
